title: Hydrocarbons: Why Morocco Fails to Meet Strategic Stock Minimum
summary:
Sixty days. That is the legal threshold for hydrocarbon security stocks Morocco has never met since adopting its energy strategy in 2009. Fifteen years, two laws, dozens of announcements, and several crises later, the national average has hovered around 30 days or less. A systemic failure laid bare at a time when Platts prices soar past $1,100.
